blockingIssues.description: tests/integration-live-data.test.ts now verifies GET /onchain/networks/eth/tokens/:address instead of the originally flaky GET /onchain/simple/networks/eth/token_price/:address path, so the promoted full-suite flake can regress undetected while the rewritten test still passes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the regression-gate-worker skill how to report success for a no-op verification feature when its scoped assertion is green but the broader promoted gate stays red for an unrelated failure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of listener-bound-bootstrap-source-class-alignment-fix found the feature was correctly completed as a no-op alignment, but the skill does not explain how to document success when the full suite still fails elsewhere.
